Cross-platform service management (systemd on Linux, launchd on macOS)

Usage: am service <COMMAND>

Commands:
  install    Generate and register a platform-native service configuration
  uninstall  Remove the service configuration and stop the running service
  status     Check if the service is running, show PID, uptime, and port
  logs       Tail service logs (journalctl --user on Linux, log show on macOS)
  restart    Graceful restart: SIGTERM with force-kill fallback
  help       Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help
